nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Marsh antwren
nodes.summary: Marsh antwren（Marsh antwren，学名 Formicivora acutirostris），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括气候变化、污染。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: As its name implies, the marsh antwren primarily inhabits coastal and riverine marshes; it occurs less frequently in flooded plains and in the transition zone between mangroves and drier land

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Some patches of habitat, including the type-locality, are under constant human pressure and have been reduced by fires, allotments and landfills." Conversion of habitat for other uses, pollution, and the effects of climate change are also threats

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Some patches of habitat, including the type-locality, are under constant human pressure and have been reduced by fires, allotments and landfills." Conversion of habitat for other uses, pollution, and the effects of climate change are also threats
